title: Assignment 2: Classification - Customer Churn Prediction Using Classification

section_anchors.text: In this assignment, you will build a classification model to predict customer churn
This dataset contains customer data from a telecommunications company, including information about services, account status, and whether the customer churned
This dataset helps classify customers based on various demographics, purchase behavior, and marketing campaign data
Convert any categorical variables (e.g., ContractType) into numerical values using one-hot encoding
Choose a classification algorithm (e.g., Logistic Regression, Decision Tree, or Random Forest)
Evaluate the model using metrics such as accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and the confusion matrix
Write a short analysis explaining how well your model performed
Jupyter notebook (.ipynb file) with your code, comments, and explanations

notes: Manually validated against markdown_evaluation/pdfs/Assignment3.pdf on 2026-04-02 using pdftotext -layout and page render inspection. This one-page assignment brief has no numbered figures or tables in the source PDF.
